questionHtml: Deduce the Lewis (electron dot) structure and shape for dinitrogen monoxide showing nitrogen as the central atom.
markschemeHtml:
Lewis structure:

 ✔


Shape: linear ✔

 

Accept

OR

.

Only award M2 if the shape corresponds to that expected for the Lewis structure given.
